author: Barbatos Labs
name: Aquarius View + ViewModel
description: A WPF UserControl (View) wired to its ViewModel via aq:Setup.Enable, plus the matching ViewModel - the closest Aquarius equivalent of scaffolding a new Vue single-file component.

namespace.description: Namespace for the generated View/ViewModel - pass --namespace YourApp.Feature. Defaults to an obviously-fake placeholder otherwise, so a forgotten override is easy to spot rather than silently landing in the wrong namespace.
